adjustments.rationale: No chapter-content-level revision needed. All audits either pass, document false-positives, or flag structural/book-level issues outside single-chapter scope.

Anti-ai 4/10 is false positive. The only finding (688 ——) is the consciousness-of-Monday stylistic baseline, consistent with Ch40/Ch41/Ch42. Audit explicitly recommends '不作为修订项'. Changing this would break stylistic consistency and worsen quality.

Pacing BLOCKING (cumulative cycle ~18>15) and CRITICAL (7 consecutive CONSTELLATION) are book-level structural issues. Forwarded to Ch44 planning for mitigation: consider embedding scene-level micro-release events or type-switch window in Ch44-Ch46.

Foreshadowing density 10/8 overrun and plan §7 documentation alignment (MH-023 omission, MH-024 label) are planning concerns. Forwarded to Ch44 planning for density normalization to ≤6/8 per audit recommendation.

budget.notes: No content changes applied. All outputs: state snapshot (truth/state_snapshot-pre-rev.md), revision decisions (chapters/chapter-43-revision-decisions.json), chapter-43.md (unchanged).
